Forward to accounts.description: In this state, the email is being forwarded to the accounts department at accounts@example.com.

Forward to legal.description: In this state, the email is being forwarded to the legal department at legal@example.com.

Forward to reception.description: In this state, the email is being forwarded to the reception at reception@example.com.

Read it.description: This state indicates that the email content is being read to determine the appropriate action based on its content.

Receive an email.description: This state represents the initial stage where an email is received and ready to be processed.
